source.book: 《9分达人雅思听力真题还原及解析6》

segments.text: Mona: Hello Tom, sorry I'm late.
segments.translation: 你好汤姆，抱歉我来晚了。

segments.text: Tom: Hi Mona, no problem.
segments.translation: 嗨莫娜，没关系。

segments.text: Tom: I heard you've finished the essay for the management course.
segments.translation: 我听说你管理课的论文已经写完了。

segments.text: Tom: Which company did you focus on?
segments.translation: 你研究的是哪家公司？

segments.text: Mona: It was finished last week.
segments.translation: 上周就写完了。

segments.text: Mona: I chose the hotel where I interned last summer and mainly concentrated on my work experience there.
segments.translation: 我选的是去年夏天实习过的那家酒店，主要写了我在那儿的工作经历。

segments.text: Tom: Could you give me some details?
segments.translation: 能跟我讲讲细节吗？

segments.text: Tom: I'm interested.
segments.translation: 我挺感兴趣的。

segments.text: Mona: Well, during my three-month internship, I observed every part of the hotel carefully each day and also talked with some of my colleagues.
segments.translation: 嗯，在为期三个月的实习期间，我每天都仔细观察酒店的各个部门，还跟一些同事聊过。

segments.text: Mona: I've found some problems in different parts of the hotel and made a conclusion in the essay.
segments.translation: 我发现酒店不同部门都存在一些问题，并在论文里做了总结。

segments.text: Mona: Let me start from the reception desk.
segments.translation: 我先从前台说起吧。

segments.text: Mona: I noticed the staff there kept doing the same thing every day, like answering the phone, helping guests with check-in and check-out, etc.
segments.translation: 我注意到那里的员工每天都在重复做同样的事，比如接电话、帮客人办理入住和退房之类的。

segments.text: Mona: There was nothing special for them.
segments.translation: 对他们来说没什么新鲜的。

segments.text: Tom: That must be very boring.
segments.translation: 那一定很无聊。

segments.text: Mona: Yeah I think so.
segments.translation: 是啊，我也这么觉得。

segments.text: Mona: And in the restaurant, the employees told me that they must obey the rules exactly.
segments.translation: 还有餐厅，员工告诉我他们必须严格遵守规定。

segments.text: Mona: For example, if they don't wear uniforms during working hours, 20% of their daily wages will be deducted.
segments.translation: 比如，如果上班时间不穿制服，就会被扣掉当天工资的百分之二十。

segments.text: Mona: And then about the coffee bar.
segments.translation: 然后说说咖啡吧。

segments.text: Mona: During peak hours, I was asked to help in the coffee bar several times, as a shortage of hands always made many customers wait long for ordering, eating or paying the bills.
segments.translation: 高峰时段，我好几次被叫去咖啡吧帮忙，因为人手不足总是让很多顾客点单、就餐或结账时等很久。

segments.text: Mona: Their own staff could not control customer flow.
segments.translation: 他们自己的员工没法应付客流量。

segments.text: Tom: Oh, that seems a little messy.
segments.translation: 哦，那听起来有点乱。

segments.text: Mona: Yes, definitely.
segments.translation: 是的，确实如此。

segments.text: Mona: And the place where I worked was a shop selling towels, and pyjamas as well as souvenirs.
segments.translation: 还有我工作过的那家店，卖毛巾、睡衣还有纪念品。

segments.text: Mona: Every day I had to be there from 9 am to 6 pm.
segments.translation: 我每天都得从早上九点待到下午六点。

segments.text: Mona: My duty was to set up the window display and serve the customers.
segments.translation: 我的职责是布置橱窗陈列和接待顾客。

segments.text: Mona: At first it seemed interesting, but later I found this work was a bit tough.
segments.translation: 一开始还觉得挺有意思，但后来发现这活儿有点累人。

segments.text: Mona: Every night when I got off work, I was nearly exhausted.
segments.translation: 每天晚上下班时，我几乎都累垮了。

segments.text: Mona: What I wanted was just a good rest and sleep.
segments.translation: 我只想好好休息、睡一觉。

segments.text: Tom: Doesn't sound like an easy job.
segments.translation: 听起来可不是个轻松的活儿。

segments.text: Mona: It definitely wasn't.
segments.translation: 确实一点都不轻松。

segments.text: Mona: Then there was the personnel office.
segments.translation: 接下来是人事办公室。

segments.text: Mona: I went there on the first day when I arrived at the hotel.
segments.translation: 我到酒店的第一天就去了那里。

segments.text: Mona: As I was not familiar with everything, I asked the staff several questions.
segments.translation: 因为我对什么都不熟悉，就问了工作人员好几个问题。

segments.text: Mona: But the employee of the personnel office seemed a bit annoyed and started complaining, which gave me a very bad impression.
segments.translation: 但人事办公室的那位员工似乎有点不耐烦，还开始抱怨，给我留下了很不好的印象。

segments.text: Mona: Lastly, as regards cleaning, it wasn't too bad compared with other parts of the hotel, except the vacuum cleaners, which were probably bought such a long time ago that the sound seemed too loud when they were working.
segments.translation: 最后，说到保洁，跟酒店其他部门比起来还不算太糟，就是那些吸尘器，大概买了很久了，工作起来声音显得太吵了。

segments.text: Mona: But fortunately, the hotel hasn't received any complaint from the customers so far.
segments.translation: 不过幸运的是，到目前为止酒店还没收到过顾客的投诉。

segments.text: Tom: I think you've benefited a lot from the internship.
segments.translation: 我觉得你从这次实习中收获了很多。

segments.text: Mona: Yeah, absolutely.
segments.translation: 是啊，绝对是。

segments.text: Mona: In the beginning, I just wanted to complete the essay for the course.
segments.translation: 一开始，我只是想完成这门课的论文。

segments.text: Mona: But in the end, I found it has given me some practical examples which are helpful to what I intend to do after graduation, as you know I've always wanted to do something related to hotel management.
segments.translation: 但到最后，我发现它给了我一些很实用的例子，对我毕业后想做的事很有帮助，你也知道我一直想从事跟酒店管理相关的工作。

segments.text: Mona: Due to the time limitation, I still haven't got a clear idea of some specific work positions.
segments.translation: 不过由于时间有限，我对一些具体的工作岗位还没有清晰的概念。

segments.text: Tom: Well, I heard you're going to give us a presentation of your essay next time in class?
segments.translation: 对了，我听说你下次课上要给我们做一个论文的展示？

segments.text: Mona: Yes, actually I'm not so good at giving a presentation.
segments.translation: 是的，其实我不太擅长做展示。

segments.text: Mona: But the tutor says that's just what he wants me to do, to know what is important when doing a presentation, like how to attract the audience, make eye contact and make gestures, etc., and other students can learn from my presentation.
segments.translation: 但导师说这正是他想让我做的，好让我明白做展示时什么最重要，比如怎么吸引观众、怎么进行眼神交流、怎么做手势之类的，其他同学也能从我的展示中学到东西。

segments.text: Tom: I'm looking forward to it.
segments.translation: 我很期待。

segments.text: Tom: You know, now I'm only in the second year of the course, and I have to write an essay next semester.
segments.translation: 你知道的，我现在才上课程的第二年，下学期就要写论文了。

segments.text: Tom: But I have no idea about where I can do an internship.
segments.translation: 但我完全不知道该去哪儿实习。

segments.text: Tom: There're several hotels which I'm interested in.
segments.translation: 有好几家酒店我都挺感兴趣的。

segments.text: Tom: Do you think I should call their managers?
segments.translation: 你觉得我该给它们的经理打电话吗？

segments.text: Mona: Well, I suggest you'd better not because you're more likely to be rejected by them.
segments.translation: 嗯，我建议你最好别这么做，因为你很可能会被他们拒绝。

segments.text: Mona: There is a career office on campus that has got a list of companies offering internship opportunities to students.
segments.translation: 校园里有个就业办公室，那儿有一份为学生提供实习机会的公司名单。

segments.text: Mona: The office will help you contact where you want to go.
segments.translation: 办公室会帮你联系你想去的地方。

segments.text: Mona: You just have to prepare your personal information like the CV.
segments.translation: 你只需要准备好个人资料，比如简历。

segments.text: Mona: Oh, don't forget to provide a reference from the tutor.
segments.translation: 哦，别忘了让导师提供一封推荐信。

segments.text: Tom: Great!
segments.translation: 太好了！

segments.text: Tom: I've got it.
segments.translation: 我明白了。

segments.text: Mona: So, have you got any plans for your essay?
segments.translation: 那你的论文有什么计划了吗？

segments.text: Tom: I've noticed that the hotel industry is developing at a high speed.
segments.translation: 我注意到酒店行业正在高速发展。

segments.text: Tom: People are more and more concerned about the quality of accommodation.
segments.translation: 人们越来越关注住宿的品质。

segments.text: Tom: What I'm struck by is the numerous statistics showing the ever-increasing number of five-star hotels, so I intend to carry out extensive research on this aspect.
segments.translation: 让我印象深刻的是那些显示五星级酒店数量不断增加的大量统计数据，所以我打算就这方面做深入的研究。

segments.text: Tom: I'm thinking about using video as a research method, but I haven't decided yet.
segments.translation: 我在考虑用视频作为研究方法，不过还没最终决定。

segments.text: Mona: I think it's an interesting topic.
segments.translation: 我觉得这是个很有意思的题目。

segments.text: Mona: Anyway, if you have any questions later, I will be happy to help.
segments.translation: 总之，你之后要是有什么问题，我很乐意帮忙。

segments.text: Tom: Thanks a lot, Mona.
segments.translation: 太感谢了，莫娜。

segments.text: Mona: You're welcome.
segments.translation: 不客气。
